title: Super visa for parents and grandparents: How to apply - Canada.ca
content:
Super visa for parents and grandparents

## Submit your application
Follow the instructions below to apply for a super visa.
- Sign in to your account
- Start the application process
- Upload forms and documents
- Submit a complete application
- Give your biometrics after you apply

## Step 1: Sign in to your account
You must be outside Canada when you apply for a super visa.
You can use the IRCC Portal to apply for a super visa.

### IRCC Portal – New version only certain people are eligible
You may be able to use the IRCC Portal – New version if you
- are 18 years of age or older
- have never applied for anything with us before
- are not using a representative (including family or friends applying for you)
Try the IRCC Portal – New version
If you or your representative can’t apply online and require accommodations, including for a disability, you may ask for the application package in one of these alternate formats:
- Prepare a new email In the subject line of your email, include the format you need (braille, large print or paper) the application package you want In the body of your email , copy and paste the text below. Then, fill in the missing information. Requested Format: [Braille / Large Print / Paper] Application Package: [Name of the application package or program] Preferred Language: [English / French] Delivery Method: [Email / Regular Mail in Canada] Applicant or Sponsor Information: Full Name (as shown on passport): Email Address (if requesting electronic delivery): Mailing Address (if requesting regular mail – Canada only): Please do not add extra information as it is not necessary and will not be taken into consideration to send out the alternate format.
- In the subject line of your email, include the format you need (braille, large print or paper) the application package you want
- the format you need (braille, large print or paper)
- the application package you want
- In the body of your email , copy and paste the text below. Then, fill in the missing information. Requested Format: [Braille / Large Print / Paper] Application Package: [Name of the application package or program] Preferred Language: [English / French] Delivery Method: [Email / Regular Mail in Canada] Applicant or Sponsor Information: Full Name (as shown on passport): Email Address (if requesting electronic delivery): Mailing Address (if requesting regular mail – Canada only):
- Requested Format: [Braille / Large Print / Paper]
- Application Package: [Name of the application package or program]
- Preferred Language: [English / French]
- Delivery Method: [Email / Regular Mail in Canada]
- Applicant or Sponsor Information: Full Name (as shown on passport): Email Address (if requesting electronic delivery): Mailing Address (if requesting regular mail – Canada only):
- Full Name (as shown on passport):
- Email Address (if requesting electronic delivery):
- Mailing Address (if requesting regular mail – Canada only):
Please do not add extra information as it is not necessary and will not be taken into consideration to send out the alternate format.
- Send your email to: IRCC.PRPortalALTRequest-DemandeALTPortailRP.IRCC@cic.gc.ca Note: we will only reply to requests for alternate formats. We won't reply to any other types of requests.
Send your email to: IRCC.PRPortalALTRequest-DemandeALTPortailRP.IRCC@cic.gc.ca
Note: we will only reply to requests for alternate formats. We won't reply to any other types of requests.
After we review your request, we’ll send the package in the format and delivery method you chose, with instructions on how to send your application back to IRCC.
If you need additional assistance applying with an alternate format, call 1-888-242-2100 (from inside Canada only).

## Step 2: Start the application process
You’ll be asked some questions after you sign into the Portal. Answer the following questions exactly as shown :
- Select Visitor visa or super visa when asked “I want to apply for”
- Select To visit my children or grandchildren for more than 6 months (super visa) when asked “Why do you need a visitor visa?”

### Get help filling out the online application
If you’re having trouble with some of the questions in your IRCC Portal application, our detailed instructions may help.
Get tips on how to complete your application
If you’re applying through the IRCC Portal – New Version , there is help text built into the Portal.

## Step 3: Upload your forms and documents
After you answer the questionnaire, you’ll get a personalized document checklist. You’ll need a scanner or camera to create electronic copies of your documents.
If you want to know what documents you might need, go to the list of all forms and documents .
Get help uploading or downloading forms

## Step 4: Pay the fees
We’ll ask you to pay your fees at the end of your application. To pay your fees, you’ll need:
- a valid email address,
- access to a printer (you’ll need to print the receipt), and
- a credit card, Debit MasterCard ® or Visa ® Debit card.
In most cases, your fees will include processing fees. If you need to give biometrics, pay the fee when you apply to avoid processing delays.
Who needs to pay this fee
Super visa fee - per person multiple entry temporary resident visa
All applicants, unless you’re from a visa-exempt country
Check if you need to give biometrics
You don’t need to pay the super visa application fee or the biometrics fee. If your super visa application is approved, you’ll be directed to apply for an electronic travel authorization (eTA), if you need one.
After you have your eTA, you’ll be provided with a letter that you will show to a border services officer upon arrival to Canada.

## Step 5: Submit a complete application
Make sure your application is complete and submit it in either the
- IRCC Portal – New version Only for eligible applicants
Foreign nationals living in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, South Sudan and Uganda can’t travel to Canada as of May 27, 2026.
Find out more about these measures

## Step 6: Give your biometrics after you apply If applicable
Wait for your biometrics instructions letter (BIL), and then book your biometrics collection appointment as soon as you can to avoid processing delays.
Find out how to give your biometrics

### If you’ve already given your biometrics before
We can’t issue you a super visa that’s valid for a period longer than your biometrics.
Extend the validity of your biometrics .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
